Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Continued To Sep-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Depostion Of Defendant Kurt Mccray
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance (Via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. KELSEY MORRIS, Esq of Jackson Lewis P.C (Tel: 415-394-9400) for Defendant Kurt MCCray;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing RE: PLAINTIFF MEURY COLADO, R'REANA MAXWELL, TIKI MAXWELL, AND REGINA HARO's Motion To Compel Depostion Of Defendant Kurt Mccray.

The Court indicates it did not receive proper notice by any party of their intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judge pro tem's report and recommendation is adopted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and which attaches a copy of the Judge Pro Tem's report and recommendation.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Depostion Of Defendant Kurt Mccray
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. EDWARD M. HIGGINBOTHAM, Esq. of Bryant Law Group, LLP (Tel: 415-581-0885) for plaintiffs;
Atty. KELSEY F. MORRIS, Esq. of Jackson Lewis P.C. (Tel: 415-394-9400) for defendant Kurt McCray.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS MEURY COLADO, R'REANA MAXWELL, TIKI MAXWELL, and REGINA HARO's Motion To Compel Depostion Of Defendant Kurt McCray.

Plaintiffs do not stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Matter discussed.
